data.name: Secret Series : BJ
data.detailed_description:
◆ The first game in the Secret series. 'Secret Series : BJ'

◇ Let's reveal the hidden image with a simple keyboard control !
◇ After clearing the game, let's play their secret video !

◇ Famous illustrations.
◇ Stages with various levels of difficulty.
◇ 18 levels.
data.about_the_game:
◆ The first game in the Secret series. 'Secret Series : BJ'

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Window7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
